samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO implementation with configurable parameters for depth and width.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="WIDTH">FIFO data width.</parameter>
        <parameter id="DEPTH">FIFO depth.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        // Define the dual-port RAM instance
        <wire id="wen" width_description="[1:0]">Write enable signals for dual-port RAM.</wire>
        <wire id="ren" width_description="[1:0]">Read enable signals for dual-port RAM.</wire>
        <wire id="waddr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Write addresses for dual-port RAM.</wire>
        <wire id="raddr" width_description="[($clog2(DEPTH))-1:0]">Read addresses for dual-port RAM.</wire>
        
        // Connect write and read enables
        assign wen[0] = winc;
        assign wen[1] = 1'b0;
        assign ren[0] = rinc;
        assign ren[1] = 1'b0;
        // Connect write and read addresses
        assign waddr = waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        assign raddr = raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];
        // Connect write data
        assign wdata = wdata;
        // Connect read data
        assign rdata = rdata;
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Dual-port RAM instance
        dual_port_RAM #(.DEPTH(DEPTH), .WIDTH(WIDTH)) ram_inst (
            .wclk(wclk),
            .wenc(wen),
            .waddr(waddr),
            .wdata(wdata),
            .rclk(rclk),
            .renc(ren),
            .raddr(raddr),
            .rdata(rdata)
        );
        // Write pointer management
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] waddr_bin;
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (winc && !wfull) begin
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        // Read pointer management
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] raddr_bin;
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            end else if (rinc && !rempty) begin
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
            end
        end
        // Convert write pointer to Gray code
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] wptr;
        always @(*) begin
            wptr = {waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)], ^waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]};
        end
        // Convert read pointer to Gray code
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] rptr;
        always @(*) begin
            rptr = {raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)], ^raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]};
        end
        // Buffer for write pointer synchronization
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] wptr_buff;
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
            end
        end
        // Buffer for read pointer synchronization
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] rptr_buff;
        always @(posedge rclk or negedge rrstn) begin
            if (!rrstn) begin
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
            end
        end
        // Synchronize read pointer with write clock domain
        reg [$clog2(DEPTH):0] rptr_syn;
        always @(posedge wclk or negedge wrstn) begin
            if (!wrstn) begin
                rptr_syn <= 0;
            end else begin
                rptr_syn <= rptr_buff;
            end
        end
        // Full condition check
        assign wfull = (wptr == {~rptr_syn[$clog2(DEPTH)], rptr_syn[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0]});
        // Empty condition check
        assign rempty = (rptr == wptr);
    </implementation>
</module>
